chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4562 of 2014 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 22149/2014 2. For hearing of main case 06-03-2025 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Zahid Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri Advocate for Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel the petition impugns a show cause notice, however, same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing, however, in the meantime no coercive action be taken against the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed in aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
